programme.desc: A criminal poses as a patient in the dental clinics of Manila and then robs and rapes their staff. Amidst an attack, he reveals he can speak the local dialect, leaving a clue for the police.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth or Deception
programme.desc: Eva Hamby sits down for a polygraph test with a former FBI agent in an effort to clear her name. Hamby was convicted of second-degree murder for the stabbing death of her boyfriend.

programme.title: Women on Death Row
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime. Ashley Wallace, who was almost killed by her own mother, Jenny Carrieri, whose search for her sister's murderer consumed her life.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When a Christian ranch hand, Dan Lavigne, 52, is shot dead on his porch in Montana, 2002, deputies find no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Destiny refuses to leave the house and says she "basically checked out of life". The extremely hoarded house has come to the attention of the homeowners, and they want the house cleaned up.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: After the brutal murder of a mom, her children, and the family dog rocks a picture-perfect Orlando suburb—all signs point to the dad, Tony Todt.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: An angry confrontation leads to a 31-year-old father facing life behind bars after shooting his ex-girlfriend's boyfriend in the leg. He insists he was defending his ex and their child from an intruder.

programme.desc: After police respond to a shooting in Chicago, a man is arrested and charged. He claims that he was attacked with a hammer before reaching for his weapon.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward packs his bags after his house gets infested, but a different kind of pest waits at his hotel. // SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. // SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he also can't figure out why!

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Trying out for the cheerleading squad, Lay Lay and Sadie add their own twists to the routine, but learn that standing out doesn't always work when trying to fit into a team.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: After Phoebe and Max let Chloe's friends watch a horror movie and eat candy, Jinx and Booch's parents want to meet Chloe's. With Hank and Barb away, Max and Phoebe transform into them to help Chloe. It goes well until the real Hank and Barb show up.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When a video of Henry and Ray transforming into Kid Danger and Captain Man gets out, Henry must go to great lengths to get it back so that his secret identity isn't revealed.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry has Schwoz's shape-shifting android fill in for him at a family dinner so he can watch the MMA fight of the year with Charlotte and Ray.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: After Danger Force thwarts a robbery at Club Soda and has a legendary night celebrating their win, Ray challenges the kids to repeat their epic night out without their superhero uniforms and powers.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly’s old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly’s best friend.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam opens a safe in her bedroom and discovers a tunnel that leads to a secret room. Cat films herself for 24 hours so that her future self can watch it 10-years from now.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo suits up as the Night Ninja one last time to take on the villainous cat named Scratch and his mutant Vampire Fleas. It's a grudge-match fifteen years in the making! But what does it all have to do with Splinter? The final battle begins!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: No one likes Rod, especially the Turtles! Bishop's former intern keeps trying to kidnap them and steal their mutant blood, but when Rod himself is kidnapped... Mikey is on the case! His first suspect: the mutant-hating Mechazoid maker BISHOP.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton's giant Chum Bucket glove runs wild in town, but SpongeBob has a handy friend to help them out. // SpongeBob takes his first break ever at work, but how will he spend his precious time?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. What could go wrong? // Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Inspired by the latest Romcom release at the Movie Theatre, Best and Bester decide to go on a match-making mission. // Toot moves into the Sub with Best and Bester, but they find there's no getting away from her smell - literally!

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester have to find a smart way to make their flight despite not looking like their passport photos. // Best decides to let his sister win "Employee of the Month" for once, but finds that losing doesn't come naturally.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: A classic villain returns to his former lair, only to find the Star Family inhabiting it. // The Patrick Show rebrands for a younger audience.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Pearl stars in a guest appearance on The Patrick Show. // Patrick and SpongeBob go back in time to watch Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy when they were new.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's 3 nieces. // SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When a freak accident causes everyone in town to become as stupid as Patrick, Sandy must save the day.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe are working well as a team, until he is accused of committing crimes and Phoebe must apprehend him. Now on the lam, Max learns that the Mastermind's henchman is secretly controlling his actions via a chip in his neck.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: After Miles has a vision that Rick Twitler is still around, Danger Force travels deep into the Man's Nest's to find him, running into an old foe along the way.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry and the gang set up a secret underground restaurant in the Man Cave for Charlotte's private dinner with music superstar Jack Swagger. When word gets out that Jack Swagger is in town, some unwanted guests crash the party.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Everyone in the family has been working hard to save up for a family vacation. But while road tripping to their destination, everything that can go for the family wrong does.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luan thinks Mr. Coconuts is out for revenge when she replaces him with Lola in her act.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy's homemade snack becomes a big hit at the Krusty Krab. // SpongeBob and Patrick's favorite comedy duo has a falling out on live television.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob celebrates the anniversary of his friendship with Squidward. Squidward does not. // Squidward's lack of talent lands him in a court ordered music class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob is recruited to cook in the big leagues, but first, he must prove his worth in the test kitchen.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick hires other Patricks to entertain at parties. // Pat-Thos shares a Hamdonian tale of love and pork products.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Pat The Hapless goes on a barbaric quest to the shopping mall.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Rusty strikes a deal with Morpheus that for a seemingly small price, Morpheus will cast spells for him. // Lincoln starts to work at Dad's restaurant when he hears that the best employee wins a dish named in their honor.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Action News team springs into action to figure out who is behind a mysterious string of pranks. // When Lincoln and friends discover Gus has a hidden talent, they work together to help him live out his dream.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. // When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: To win their school film festival, Lincoln and Clyde cast Lynn as their movie's extreme stunt double. // A fishing trip with Gramps turns into an obsessive chase when Gramps' old fish rival, Moby Rick, swims nearby.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Lily and Jack are half-siblings thrown together for a summer who must learn how to navigate their new family dynamic while also helping with the Wylde Pak family's chaotic pet grooming business.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Halmoni feels she looks helpless about technology, so she becomes a master hacker and vows to destroy their internet FOREVER!

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: When Will accidentally befriends an annoying man, his sorry attempts at a break-up make things painfully awkward for the whole family.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'The Sharks' are the toughest guys in town, but their next confrontation might be too much for SpongeBob to handle. // Plankton clones SpongeBob in an effort to steal Krabs’ secret formula, but original Bob might ruin his plans.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton creates a clone of himself and Mr. Krabs, but neither restaurant is safe from the newcomer.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. // Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Leni is put in charge of the school's prom, she is determined to make it the most memorable night ever. // Lincoln and Clyde cast Luan as the villain, Bee Trayal, in their David Steele film and have to deal with her method acting.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change it up.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family throws Jack a goodbye party, but he only cares about impressing his mom if she comes to Canyon Valley. // The end of the summer has arrived and the kids go on a wild adventure to get Jack to the airport on time.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Chloe is struggling with her leadership skills, but when a villain attacks her school field trip, Max and Phoebe have to put Chloe in charge while they try to take down the villain and defuse his dangerous astronomical weapon.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When Miss Shapen’s niece, Noelle, comes into town and chooses Jasper over Henry, Henry discovers that Noelle has much bigger plans than just going out to dinner with Jasper.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam accidentally reveals to Carly that she and Freddie shared a secret kiss, Carly confronts them both about why they never told her about it. Meanwhile, Spencer goes to prison to teach an art class to convicts.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Marky's favorite social media influencer Beastie Pie, is hosting a gross food-eating competition at BoomBox Burger. When Sadie and Lay Lay overhear Beastie plans to rig the contest, they must work together to convince Marky that Beastie is a fraud.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. // After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the 'perfect' family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. // Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton's family open their own restaurant...directly next to the Chum Bucket. // SpongeBob suddenly finds everything funny...much to everyone's annoyance.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The Stars celebrate Patrick's birthday at the Chum Bucket. // Patrick and Squidina explore Bikini Bottom late at night.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick hosts a telethon to raise money for snails who can't dance.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Loud kids help Flip clean up his image to impress his middle school crush. // When the Mortician's Club can't afford tickets to Casket Con, they decide to start a business to raise money.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: After receiving an invitation to a gallery opening, Squidward scrambles to find a friend to take with him. // While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Sari Saring Sine: Forever
programme.desc: A girl decides to run away from her home after she learns that her family is going to have her married to the person she does not love. Later, she meets a biker and falls in love with him.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures S2 ep 1
programme.desc: Since the end of Season 1, Par Jack (Benjie Paras) has made his ghost whispering ability a full-time business and is now a popular Ghost Whisperer in the country. Still with the help of his sidekicks, Nik and Bur, they now conduct business at their new facility, Day Scare Center.

programme.title: The Last Woman Standing ep 9
programme.desc: After the death of his wife, a man's four mistresses compete against one another to become his next wife, as his wife's ghost continues to haunt them.

programme.title: Team A S2 ep 2
programme.desc: Matapos mapatunayan nila Janet (Kim Molina) at Ian (Jerald Napoles) ang pagmamahalan at diskarte sa kani-kanilang pamilya, ano pa ang mga pagsubok na haharapin ng pamilya Ambida? Ano ang naghihintay sa paglipat nila sa bago nilang komunidad lalo pa at magtatagpo uli si Janet at Enzo (Wilbert Ross), ex boyfriend ni Janet, na tutulong din sa kanilang negosyo? Paano ito haharapin ni Ian sa gitna ng pagkawala ng trabaho?

programme.title: The Mysterious Case of Bea Montenegro ep 8
programme.desc: A Sari-Sari Original Series. Hot off the heels from her last cold case, investigative journalist Christine Del Mundo (Maui Taylor) is back with a brand new cold case. This time, it involves actress Bea Montenegro, whose death has only brought forth one suspect - a fellow model who suffers from face blindness.
